summary: Frontend-only test of GashaBits 5-for-4 discount, bundle-deal note, invoice totals, cancel reset, cabinet render, responsiveness, and console cleanliness. All testable items PASS.

test_results.bundle_deal_note: PASS - visible only at qty=5 with text '🎉 Bundle deal — 5 pulls for the price of 4!'; absent for qty 1-4
test_results.invoice_totals: PASS - qty5 lead has $0.60 and '5 pulls'; qty3 lead has $0.45 and '3 pulls'
test_results.cancel_reset: PASS - returns to IDLE, label reset to '$0.15 (1 pull)', bundle-deal removed
test_results.cabinet_render: PASS - gashapon-cabinet, machine-globe, machine-lever, machine-prize-slot present; no prize-capsules in IDLE
test_results.responsive_mobile_390: PASS - no horizontal scroll (scrollWidth=clientWidth=390); qty buttons + deal note visible
test_results.console_errors: PASS - 0 app-level JS errors/warnings across all interactions
test_results.reveal_only_items: NOT TESTABLE - rarity badges, colored glow, download-all ZIP require real LTC payment (as documented in review request)

context_for_next_testing_agent: 5-for-4 bundle discount is fully implemented and verified. qty=5 costs exactly the same as qty=4 in USD and computed LTC amount. Rarity UI and ZIP download live on unreachable REVEALED state (requires real on-chain LTC), cannot be exercised in preview.
